title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Failure Triage
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a durable task state and handoff record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.
Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
Use a changed debug case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the State Summary trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.

content.text: For State Summary, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies State Summary, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-handoff-quality-tbd71" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Handoff Quality into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-handoff-quality-tbd71
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Handoff Quality applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
